title: Bonney Meets the Crew
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Kid, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Dorry as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: New World

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What now?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just keep listening, Lucci.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Vegapunk is technically still a single individual,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But his genius is second only to his busyness. When there's not enough time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You say they say you're as busy as a beaver, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, imagine if there were more than one beaver*.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was his grand idea, to split up into six people!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In other words, all 6 of these "satellite"...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Are also Dr. Vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and I'm the weird one for thinking that sounds impossible?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Geniuses are such a pain.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In short, our assignment is to return this problem child back to egghead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Then, while taking care not to damage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...any of the lab's precious assets,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're to eliminate every last vegapunk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we're meant to kill the single most useful man in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if this has something to do with the recent Lulusia incident...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone with instincts like yours should know better than to question these things.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Agreed! Don't get us in any hot water, Lucci!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We made it to the surface!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Let's track down some grub!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Woah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, I forgot to mention that I ran into SABO at Mary Geoise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Whatever, I can spill the beans later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What is all this stuff?!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Is that a giant robot?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's all sorts of things up there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And a Space Monster?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
